# Surfaces

## Purpose

Principles for every interface people or systems use to engage this project.

## Surfaces

HTTP APIs, CLIs, and library entry points.

## Principles

Clear contracts; fail loudly; prefer stable names.

## Conventions by surface

CLI: flags before positionals; non-zero exit on hard errors.

## Assets and exemplars

None yet.

## Out of scope

Third-party UIs outside this repo.
